a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567001.name: deployment.environment
a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567001.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') AS `deployment.environment`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'kafka.brokers'
GROUP BY `deployment.environment`

a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567002.name: kafka.cluster.alias
a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567002.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'kafka.cluster.alias') AS `kafka.cluster.alias`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'kafka.brokers'
GROUP BY `kafka.cluster.alias`

widgets.description: Total number of brokers in the Kafka cluster
widgets.title: Broker Count

widgets.description: Log retention time configured per broker
widgets.title: Broker Log Retention Period

widgets.description: Current approximate lag of each consumer group at partition level
widgets.title: Consumer Group Lag

widgets.description: Sum of consumer group lag across all partitions of each topic
widgets.title: Consumer Group Lag (Sum)

widgets.description: Number of members in each consumer group
widgets.title: Consumer Group Members

widgets.description: Sum of consumer group offset across partitions of each topic
widgets.title: Consumer Group Offset (Sum)

widgets.description: Minimum number of in-sync replicas required per topic
widgets.title: Topic Min In-Sync Replicas

widgets.description: Log retention period configured per topic
widgets.title: Topic Log Retention Period

widgets.description: Log retention size configured per topic (-1 indicates infinite)
widgets.title: Topic Log Retention Size

widgets.description: Current offset of each partition per topic
widgets.title: Partition Current Offset

widgets.description: Oldest offset of each partition per topic
widgets.title: Partition Oldest Offset

widgets.description: Number of replicas for each partition per topic
widgets.title: Partition Replicas

widgets.description: Number of in-sync replicas for each partition per topic
widgets.title: Partition In-Sync Replicas
